title: Bridge Essay: Consciousness, philosophy, and neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Consciousness,, philosophy,, and, neuroscience..

**Consciousness, philosophy, and neuroscience.** — Acta Neurochir (Wien). PMID: 35320396. DOI: 10.1007/s00701-022-05179-w. The aim of this mini-review paper is to present an overview of work on consciousness from aphilosophical perspective, and to argue for the continuing relevance of philosophy in consciousness research. After introducing some major philosophical positions about the relationship between consciousness and matter, we argue that the problem of consciousness that many authors have focused on-the mind-body or mind-brain problem-is only one among several problems of consciousness.
